cpputest__cpputest-1502.dockerfile:
FROM gcc:11
WORKDIR /testbed

# Install git for cloning
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y git

# Clone repository and checkout base commit
RUN git clone https://github.com/cpputest/cpputest.git /testbed
RUN cd /testbed && git checkout 2e177fa09f2f46f6bd936227433fc56a7b4292b7

# Agent's verified setup instructions
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y build-essential cmake autoconf automake libtool
RUN cd build && cmake .. && make -j$(nproc)


# Apply test patch and reinstall dependencies
COPY test.patch /tmp/test.patch
COPY apply_test_patch.sh /tmp/apply_test_patch.sh
RUN chmod +x /tmp/apply_test_patch.sh && /bin/bash /tmp/apply_test_patch.sh
cpputest__cpputest-1502.eval_script:
#!/bin/bash

cd /testbed



set +e
(
cd build && cmake .. && make -j$(nproc)
) && \
(
build/tests/CppUTest/CppUTestTests
) && \
(
./build/tests/CppUTestExt/CppUTestExtTests
)
TEST_EXIT_CODE=$?
set -e

echo "echo OMNIGRIL_EXIT_CODE=$TEST_EXIT_CODE"
exit $TEST_EXIT_CODE

setup_scripts.apply_test_patch.sh:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

cd /testbed

echo "[test_patch] validating patch with git apply --check"
if git apply --check /tmp/test.patch; then
    echo "[test_patch] git apply --check passed"
    git apply /tmp/test.patch
    echo "[test_patch] git apply succeeded"
    exit 0
fi

echo "[test_patch] git apply --check failed, trying patch fallback"
if command -v patch >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    if patch --batch --fuzz=5 -p1 -i /tmp/test.patch; then
        echo "[test_patch] patch fallback succeeded"
        exit 0
    fi
    echo "[test_patch] patch fallback failed"
else
    echo "[test_patch] patch command is not available for fallback"
fi

echo "[test_patch] unable to apply /tmp/test.patch"
exit 1
